_source: benchmarks/samples/ims-checkout.pdf — Inventory Management Solutions public sample check-out report (6pp; dilapidations table pp.4-5)
_method: Hand-labelled 3 Jul 2026 from the clerk's own abbreviation calls (report p.3 abbreviations table). One entry per clerk call; multi-line table rows split into sub-entries (a/b/c). The 'observation' field is the clerk's comment with the liability codes STRIPPED and neutral abbreviations expanded, so the rubric never sees the answer. 'checkin' comes from the row's Description column ('as on inv').

_class_mapping.cleaning: CC (cleaning charges — tenant cost), incl. NTC/NFC observations the clerk charged as CC
_class_mapping.damage: TC (tenant cost) / MI-TC (maintenance issue — tenant cost)
_class_mapping.landlord_responsibility: LL / MI-LC (maintenance issue — landlord cost) / LL-CC (pre-existing dirt recorded 'as inv', landlord's cleaning matter)

_exclusions: Entries whose only call is '?' (confirmation required) or a neutral note carry clerk_class null with an exclude_reason and are not scored. Entries with a code AND a trailing '?' are scored with provisional=true.

_context.tenancy_months_basis: report p.3: tenancy from 03/01/2013; check-out photos (p.6) timestamped 11/09/2013
